reviews.comment:
Todo lo necesario en una estación de servicios. Atención destacada.

(Translated by Google)
Everything you need at a service station. Outstanding service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNFl1eTJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para parar a descansar luego de conducir un rato largo. Los baños muy limpios. Varias opciones de comida. Las hamburguesas buenisimas. Todo para comprar, muy completa la parada, ademas de cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop and rest after a long drive. The restrooms are very clean. There are several food options. The hamburgers are delicious. They have everything you need for shopping, making it a very complete stop, and they also sell gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXb1pYOHJBRRAB
